description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chair featuring a high, slightly curved backrest and a thick, cushioned seat. The chair is supported by a distinctive circular metal base, which provides both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, light-colored synthetic leather or fabric, giving it a sleek and clean look. The seat and backrest are ergonomically contoured for comfort, with no visible armrests, emphasizing its streamlined design. The base is a dark, metallic ring that contrasts with the light upholstery, adding visual interest. This chair would be well-suited for urban interiors such as offices, waiting areas, or modern homes.
description: A modern chair with a high backrest, cushioned seat, and a circular metal base, upholstered in light-colored material. Its sleek, armless design and contrasting dark base give it a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, rectangular backrest and the circular base directly beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic curve of the backrest and seat, as well as the continuous loop of the circular base.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the full width of the seat and the open ring of the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same ergonomic profile and the circular base structure.
